creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 189497
Update sysutils/node_exporter to 0.15.2

Updates sysutils/node_exporter to 0.15.2, a minor bug fix release.
A minor BSD specific bug was fixed in the previous 0.15.1 release of the node_exporter.

Details of the bug can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/pull/712
